claimText: The State of Global Air Report (SoGA) 2025 is released by the Health Effects Institute (HEI) and the Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation (IHME).
evidenceExcerpt: State of Global Air Report (SoGA) 2025 Released by: Health Effects Institute (HEI) and Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation (IHME), USA.

claimText: According to the State of Global Air Report (SoGA) 2025, India has the third highest exposure to Ozone Pollution globally.
evidenceExcerpt: Ozone Pollution: India has third highest exposure.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's pollution rankings.
distractorHooks: India has the highest exposure to Ozone Pollution
India has the lowest exposure to Ozone Pollution

claimText: The Air Quality Life Index (AQLI) is developed by the Energy Policy Institute at the University of Chicago (EPIC).
evidenceExcerpt: 2025 Annual Update of the Air Quality Life Index (AQLI) Developer: Michael Greenstone and others at Energy Policy Institute at University of Chicago (EPIC).

claimText: The Air Quality Life Index (AQLI) specifically measures the impact of particulate air pollution on life expectancy.
evidenceExcerpt: Measures the impact of particulate air pollution on life expectancy.
examUse: Statement-based question on the methodology and focus of the AQLI.
distractorHooks: Measures the impact of ozone pollution on life expectancy
Measures the economic cost of air pollution on healthcare systems

claimText: The Global Trade Update on Mobilising trade to curb Plastic Pollution is released by the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD).
evidenceExcerpt: Global Trade Update on Mobilising trade to curb Plastic Pollution Released by: UNCTAD.
